name: Cream of Squash Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion and garlic in butter in a Dutch oven.
2. Stir in squash, chicken broth, and water; cover and simmer 15 minutes or until squash is tender.
3. Spoon mixture into container of an electric blender, and process until smooth.
4. Return squash mixture to Dutch oven; stir in half-and-half and pepper.
5. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until well heated.
6. Serve hot or chilled. Garnish with parsley.
Yield: 5 cups.
